title: cci-kg: An Epistemological Knowledge Graph of Marx's Capital — Companion Data
author: López, Emiliano
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository provides the data, evaluation materials, and documentation of the extraction protocol for a two-layer, four-dimensional knowledge graph of Marx's *Capital* (Volumes I–III). 
 The graph separates a theoretical layer (66 concepts, 234 typed triplets, 6 dialectical predicate types, 3 hierarchical levels) from a structurally subordinate empirical layer (215 instances of material of development). The architecture derives from Marx's own Darstellungslogik, the logic of presentation through which Capital's categories are established by derivation.
steps_raw:
This repository provides the data, evaluation materials, and documentation of the extraction protocol for a two-layer, four-dimensional knowledge graph of Marx's *Capital* (Volumes I–III). 
 The graph separates a theoretical layer (66 concepts, 234 typed triplets, 6 dialectical predicate types, 3 hierarchical levels) from a structurally subordinate empirical layer (215 instances of material of development). The architecture derives from Marx's own Darstellungslogik, the logic of presentation through which Capital's categories are established by derivation.
